programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Boy's Story
programme.desc: A money order salesman is brutally murdered and two teenage brothers and their best friend are arrested. They spend almost four decades behind bars, until a journalist takes notice of the case and uncovers evidence of the men’s innocence.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Cruel and Unusual: Botched Executions
programme.desc: Lethal injection has experienced a series of botched executions in several states including Ohio, Arizona, and Oklahoma.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness
programme.desc: A woman's tragedy may help bring closure to a 13-year-old case where a young mother was brutally sexually assaulted and killed in her own apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Legionnaires' Disease
programme.desc: History was made in Philadelphia in the summer of 1976 -- not because of the bicentennial, but because of the mysterious death of 34 Legionnaires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Wilson Murder
programme.desc: An eye doctor is found beaten to death, by his wife. When police arrest an itinerant painter for the murder, he accuses the wife and her sister of hiring him to kill the doctor. Investigators must use forensic science to work out just what happen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Low Maintenance
programme.desc: When a young college student is found dead in her apartment, an autopsy rules the suspicious death a homicide. Months later, investigators learn about an incident from the victim's past which gives them some clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flashover
programme.desc: A fire erupted in the Kings Cross Underground Station in London.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seedy Intentions
programme.desc: When a nine-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic’s vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to help them to also find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: See No Evil
programme.desc: Police uncover a string of murdered prostitutes, each of which have had their eyes carved out.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: Date With the Devil

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: Mommy's Dirty Deeds

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Shopping With a Killer

programme.title: Forensic Files: Payback
programme.desc: In 1993 a 20 year old boy is found beaten to death and murdered in Florida. Soon, a bizarre story unfolds of sex, jealousy, and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: A Northern Kentucky businessman is shot to death at his home in front of his wife. Police launch a massive manhunt to find the culprit, but their efforts were futile. A baseball bat and forensic investigation break the case wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Yeti: Unmasking the Myth

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mysterious Last Hike
programme.desc: The Dyatlov Pass Incident is still one of the strangest and most brutal cold cases. Nine Soviet hikers died, and sixty years later, no one knows how or why. Josh Gates and two investigators re-trace the last steps of the hikers.

programme.desc: Josh traverses Africa's Kalahari Desert, looking for a fabled lost city.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Yamashita's Gold

programme.desc: In the dark caves and thick jungles of Puerto Rico, Josh Gates tracks a possible Chupacabra.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: The Truth Will Set You Free
programme.desc: Brittany learns Yazan's family wants them married immediately, but she's hiding a big secret. Sumit's friends are concerned about Jenny's return. Ari's doctor is worried about her giving birth in Ethiopia. Armando has to come clean to his family.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Heart My Broken
programme.desc: Deavan has serious doubts before moving back to South Korea. Kenny has an emotional family dinner. Ari's family confronts her about Biniyam's motives. Jenny takes a leap of faith to be with Sumit. Brittany is Jordan-bound with a shocking secret.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: My Life in 7 Suitcases
programme.desc: Ari leaves her life behind to be with Biniyam in Ethiopia, but her mom has standards. Jenny is shocked when she arrives at her new home in India. Chaos erupts when Brittany arrives in Jordan. Jihoon reveals he is keeping another secret from Deavan.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Wing and a Prayer
programme.desc: Brittany already has doubts about her decision. Biniyam's friends are worried he's made the same mistake twice. Deavan and Jihoon's new apartment is not what they expected. Tim reveals the real reason he's moving to Colombia.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Don't Grumpy Stop
programme.desc: Deavan is upset by Jihoon's lack of preparation. Tim packs up his house, hoping this move will save his relationship. Ari arrives in Ethiopia and is shocked over her new apartment. Jenny puts pressure on Sumit.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: I'm Not Your Baby
programme.desc: Bini's apartment options shock Ari and her mom. Armando prepares for Kenny's arrival. Jenny is out of patience with Sumit's excuses on his divorce papers. Deavan is done with Jihoon's lies. Brittany's visit with Yazan's parents doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Rude Awakening
programme.desc: Brittany feels alone after clashing with Yazan's parents. Kenny and Armando are finally reunited. Jenny meets Sumit's lawyer and learns the truth about his divorce. Tim moves to Colombia to win back Melyza. Distraught, Jihoon turns to his mom for help.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Crossing the Line
programme.desc: Tim gets the welcome from Melyza that he feared. Ari's mom goes on the offensive. Brittany and Yazan turn to an ally for help. Kenny and Armando's first trip into town together worries them both. Tired of Jihoon's lies, Deavan presses for the truth.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Forgiven, Not Forgotten

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Global Comes Local
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and his son Hunter cook up some Triple-D style takeout with four chefs over video chat. There's authentic Mexican from Phoenix, kolaches from Salt Lake City, Baltimore pit beef and pork belly all the way from Maui.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Passport of Flavor
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's diving into killer cuisine with international flair. In Lansing he checks out a Middle Eastern joint that puts out serious shawarma and gangster grape leaves. Plus, a Vietnamese spot is serving real-deal spring rolls and brisket.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A World of Barbecue
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's firing up an entire world of barbecue on this trip. In Wilmington, a righteous spot is smokin' up chicken salad and off-the-chain chili.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chicken Chowfest
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's filling up on winner winner chicken dinners. In Baltimore, the local landmark dishes out wicked wings alongside a steak wrap. In Eugene, Oregon, a soul food joint has BBQ chicken on top of their signature burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Rings and Fries

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Here I Come, Pants!

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Beer-Battered Rip-Off
programme.desc: When Alan breaks up with their social worker to get back together with Lyndsey, Walden worries it will affect Louis' adoption.

programme.desc: Walden fears if he breaks up with Ms. McMartin, it will jeopardize his adoption of Louis. Also, Alan hesitates when Lyndsey asks him to move in with her.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Don't Give a Monkey a Gun

programme.desc: Walden and Alan discover that Charlie Harper might be alive or not.

programme.desc: Berta moves into Alan's room as he prepares to leave his Malibu house and Walden enlists Alan's help to confront his ex-wife.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Big Girls Don't Throw Food

programme.title: The King of Queens: Doug Out

programme.title: The King of Queens: Tube Stakes
programme.desc: Doug is horrified to wake up one morning to discover his beloved big-screen TV is missing.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Get Away
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie go away for a romantic weekend with Deacon and Kelly.

programme.title: The King of Queens: I, Candy
programme.desc: Doug is giddy with excitement when the hot waitress at his local hangout flirts with him.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Big Bang
programme.desc: After waiting to consummate her relationship with Mr. Harris, Christine is finally ready, until Barb gives her reason to worry. Matthew rethinks medical school after discovering that his assigned cadaver is a former neighbour.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Beauty Is Only Spanx Deep
programme.desc: Christine considers plastic surgery after a pretty young waitress flirts with Mr. Harris.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Popular
programme.desc: Christine is shocked when a new dad at Ritchie's school calls her a 'meanie mom' for being judgmental and standoffish, and dumps her for Marly and Lindsay.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Traffic
programme.desc: Christine promises to accompany Mr. Harris to an important event but leaves him hanging when Ritchie's soccer game goes into overtime.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Between a Rock and a Hard Place
programme.desc: Christine attempts to get over her break-up with Mr. Harris. Matthew goes to therapy and learns that his intimacy issues are not due to his dysfunctional relationship with his mother.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The New Adventures of Old Christine
programme.desc: Christine reluctantly lets New Christine set her up on a blind date but is disconcerted when she finds out more about him.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: House
programme.desc: When Christine learns that Richards and New Christine bought the house she had always dreamed of, she attempts to feel genuinely happy for them.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Burning Down the House
programme.desc: Christine considers taking a walk on the wild side in order to make Barb think she's not a square.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Happy Couple
programme.desc: Barb and Matthew, who are still determining whether to be a couple after an intimate night together, pretend to be inseparable after Christine tries to keep them apart.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: One and a Half Men
programme.desc: Christine tries to take charge of her hormones when her gynaecologist suggests that she may be experiencing pre-menopause.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: A Decent Proposal
programme.desc: Christine proposes to save her best friend, Barb, from being deported to the Bahamas, by marrying her. Meanwhile, Richard attempts proposing marriage to New Christine.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Operation
programme.desc: Dorothy is hesitant about having foot surgery just as she was scheduled to tap dance with Blanche and Rose at a dance recital.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Second Motherhood
programme.desc: Blanche is romanced by a wealthy suitor who she learns has several small children. This fact dampens his proposal of marriage. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Rose go to bat with the bathroom plumbing.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Adult Education
programme.desc: Blanche's psychology professor sexually harasses her when she goes to him for help on a difficult test. Blanche's professor makes her a harassing deal: If she has sex with him, he'll give her an 'A' for the exam.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Flu Attack (aka The Flu)
programme.desc: A week before an awards ceremony, Blanche, Dorothy and Rose each come down with a nasty flu, which compounds their arguing over who will win a prestigious award.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Job Hunting
programme.desc: When Rose loses her job at the grief center, she begins searching for other sources of work. Meanwhile, Blanche tries to lose a few pounds and Dorothy is excited when a man she once had a crush on asks her out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blind Ambitions
programme.desc: Rose's sister, Lily, can't accept the fact that now that she's blind, she needs help.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: End of the Curse
programme.desc: Blanche is mortified after taking a pregnancy test which indicates she's pregnant. Then after visiting her doctor, she learns the truth, she's beginning menopause.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Take Him, He's Mine
programme.desc: Dorothy dumps a depressed Stan on Blanche so that she can go out with a naval officer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Family Affair
programme.desc: A generational clash occurs when Dorothy's son Michael and Rose's daughter Bridget visit.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Vacation
programme.desc: The girls' dream vacation in the Caribbean turns out to be far from what was advertised in the brochure. While the girls are away, Sophia romances the gardener.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Joust Between Friends
programme.desc: Laid off from work, Dorothy searches for part-time work which leads to Blanche getting her a job at the museum. Then fur flies when Dorothy is handed the job of organizing a banquet, the duty Blanche was hoping for.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love, Rose
programme.desc: Rose places an ad in the personals column and she is let down when she doesn't hear an immediate response. This leads Blanche and Dorothy to begin responding under the name Isaac Newton.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Sisters
programme.desc: As a birthday present for Sophia, Dorothy brings Sophia's sister over from Sicily.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Before and After
programme.desc: Rose is convinced she died during a throat spasm. This leads her to live her life to the hilt, totally disrupting the other girls' lives. Then, when the girls complain about her new lifestyle, Rose moves out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: And Then There Was One
programme.desc: Sophia readies herself for participating in a walkathon. Meanwhile, Dorothy, Blanche, and Rose babysit for the walkathon participants' children. But when the event is over, a baby is left unclaimed.

programme.desc: Wealthy residents felt safe in their gated community but it was not safe for one millionaire, murdered in his waterfront home. Police investigated but the case grew cold. Turned out the key to solving it, or two keys, were right at the front door.

programme.desc: The save the date cards had gone out. Angie Ver Huel went to sleep next to her fiancé, Justin Michael, with big dreams but woke up to a nightmare. Someone was running from their bedroom and Justin was dead.

programme.title: License to Kill: Killer Caregiver
programme.desc: In 1990, Florida police were notified of an unexplained death at Rosedale Manor Nursing Home. Investigators uncover numerous mysterious deaths linked to the same nurse. Detectives race to stop a serial killer before another life is lost.

programme.desc: A Halloween weekend becomes a real life horror when a Jacksonville firefighter discovers a brutal scene inside his darkened bedroom.

programme.title: Dateline: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: A Halloween weekend becomes a real life horror when a Jacksonville firefighter discovers a brutal scene inside his darkened bedroom.

programme.title: Dateline: The Mystery Man

programme.title: Snapped: Michelle Williams

programme.title: Snapped: Colette Reyes

programme.title: Snapped: Robyn Davis
programme.desc: Best friends band together after a husband's death, but are they sharing a deadly secret?

programme.title: Snapped: Omaima Nelson

programme.title: Snapped: Tammy Armstrong
programme.desc: In a classic game of good cop bad cop, a determined detective befriends a Wisconsin woman to solve her boyfriend's suspicious disappearance.

programme.title: Snapped: Whitehead Twins

programme.title: Snapped: Sandra Plunkett
programme.desc: After a bed-ridden former police officer is executed in his own home, police rely on his wife's testimony to bring the murderer to justice.

programme.desc: When a marriage ends in flames, police must determine whether it was an accident or an act of revenge.

programme.title: Snapped: Mandy Smith

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Just One of the Boyz 4 Now for Now

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Taking of Funtime One Two Three

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Tweentrepreneurs
programme.desc: Tina, Louise and Gene get a taste of business when they join the school's Tweentrepeneurs club. Back at the restaurant, Bob and Linda find themselves outsmarted by a dine-and-dasher.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Live and Let Fly
programme.desc: The kids learn the dangers of revenge when their plan to get back at the school guidance counselor gets them entangled in a deep rooted sibling rivalry between two pilots.

programme.title: Family Guy: Big Trouble in Little Quahog
programme.desc: After Brian teases Stewie for being small, Stewie invents a shrinking machine that results in both of them shrinking to a microscopic size.

programme.title: Family Guy: Regarding Carter
programme.desc: Lois receives a surprising birthday present from her father, Carter Pewterschmidt, that leads to an unfortunate accident leaving him dependent on Lois and the Griffin’s care.

programme.title: Family Guy: Stand by Meg

programme.title: Family Guy: The Griffin Winter Games

programme.title: Family Guy: Con Heiress
programme.desc: Stewie and Brian compete for the inheritance of a wealthy, older heiress. Meanwhile, Peter and Chris battle for Mr. Herbert's affection.

programme.title: Mom: Twinkle Lights and Grandma Shoes

programme.title: Movie: Unfriended: Dark Web
programme.desc: A young man brings home a laptop abandoned in a lost-and-found bin, and in a secret file on it he discovers disturbing videos. After sharing them with his friends in an attempt to determine whether or not they're real, they find themselves targeted.

programme.title: Movie: Slender Man
programme.desc: A figure ripped out of nightmares terrifies a small town after a girl goes missing. Called the Slender Man, it appears as a tall and thin figure with grotesquely long arms and a face without features that prays on youth and turns them against each other.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Itchy, Scratchy & Marge
programme.desc: After watching an Itchy and Scratchy cartoon, Marge vows to eliminate violence on TV.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Brush With Greatness
programme.desc: Homer tackles his weight problem; Marge is commissioned to paint a portrait of Mr. Burns.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lost Our Lisa
programme.desc: Determined to go to the museum, Lisa tricks Homer into allowing her to take the bus alone.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Make Room for Lisa
programme.desc: Homer lets a phone company put a tower in their house, making Bart and Lisa share a room.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Regina Monologues
programme.desc: The Simpsons set off to England where Homer accidentally rear-ends the Queen.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Girl Who Slept Too Little
programme.desc: Lisa suffers sleepless nights when a cemetery is moved to the Simpsons' neighbouring lot.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa the Drama Queen
programme.desc: Lisa meets an equally academic and creative new friend named Juliet, and together they construct a fantasy world that takes them both a little too far from reality.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Man Who Grew Too Much
programme.desc: On a research trip, Lisa is shocked to discover that Sideshow Bob is now the chief scientist at a massive chemical engineering company, but her fears are allayed as she becomes enamoured with his likeminded appreciation of high-culture.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Is Where the Art Isn't
programme.desc: When Homer is accused of stealing a million-dollar painting, only a detective from the 1970s can clear his name, or send him to jail.

programme.title: The Simpsons: 3 Scenes Plus a Tag From a Marriage
programme.desc: Homer and Marge recount the story of their transition from loving their life without kids to being miserable parents.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Cities
programme.desc: Rooted on the slope of a rocky hill in Namaqualand, South Africa stands The Namaqua Rock Fig Tree. with the ability to withstand the unforgiving conditions of the surrounding desolate landscape, and with minimal rainfall, it is a testament to survival.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Islands
programme.desc: For some, remote islands offer sanctuary away from the mainland: the tiny pygmy three-toed sloth only survives because of the peace and safety offered by its Caribbean island home, while seabirds like albatross thrive in predator-free isolation.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Mountains
programme.desc: In this episode we climb high into the world's great mountain ranges. Only a few pioneering animals have what it takes to survive up here, they are amongst the most elusive and mysterious on the planet.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles are the richest places on Earth. A magical world of surprise, drama and unforgettable wild characters. From the jungles of Brazil to Costa Rica, watch as the animals face life in the most competitive place on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Deserts
programme.desc: In this episode we visit the world's deserts, a land of extremes that pushes life to the limit. Animals here have developed ingenious ways of dealing with the hostile conditions giving rise to the most incredible survival stories on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Grasslands
programme.desc: Grasslands cover one quarter of all land and support the greatest gatherings of wildlife on Earth. The extraordinary creatures that live here must survive the most hostile seasons on the planet.

programme.desc: Competition to win a partner has created both the most extraordinary beauty and life-threatening violence found anywhere in nature. The stakes could not be higher: without a mate, the journey of life ends.

programme.title: Life Story: Parenthood
programme.desc: Raising offspring and continuing the line is the next best thing to immortality.

programme.title: Wild Galapagos

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Monster Graveyard
programme.desc: At a mysterious site in the Gobi Desert, experts have discovered a monster graveyard, and this groundbreaking find contains the treasures of the alien beasts that once lived in this strange world.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Occult Temple
programme.desc: Satellites capture a temple-like, Nazi structure hidden deep in the forests of Poland, leading an expert to investigate and uncover a tale of terrifying rituals, black magic and the rise of the most feared division of Hitler's war machine.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Ship of Hell Island
programme.desc: A ghost ship is found abandoned on a remote island that's home to one of the world's last uncontacted tribes. A strange labyrinth in Sicily might have a sinister connection to the Mafia. New evidence reveals a mysterious military compound in Russia.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Monster Graveyard
programme.desc: At a mysterious site in the Gobi Desert, experts have discovered a monster graveyard, and this groundbreaking find contains the treasures of the alien beasts that once lived in this strange world.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Sergeant and the Schoolgirl
programme.desc: When high school senior Michelle Miller joins the Future Soldiers program, she sees it as the first step to realizing her dream of enlisting in the Army. But a forbidden affair with her recruiter risks her career in the Army, and her future itself.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: She Loves Me Not
programme.desc: When Special Forces Major David Shannon is fatally shot in his family home, investigators wonder if his job made him a target. But a deeper inspection of his personal life reveals sordid secrets... possibly leading to his murder.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Yes, Master.
programme.desc: When an aspiring kindergarten teacher in Dublin, Ireland goes missing, her family assumes depression over her mother's death drove her to suicide. They never suspected the real reason – involving a twisted BDSM master gone horribly wrong.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Sick and Twisted
programme.desc: Dana MacKay is found viciously beaten to death while her husband is out of town. One suspect comes to mind: a woman who's been stalking Dana for the last month. But it will take a cellphone with X-rated text messages to unravel this mystery.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Dr. Deception
programme.desc: When Jean Claude Dominique is the victim of a hit-and-run, his wife Eliette rushes to his side. It's there she comes face-to-face with his OTHER wife. It's her first glimpse into his double life that leads to her fighting for her own.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Fear the Ether Man
programme.desc: A serial rapist known as the Ether Man lurks in the shadows of Albuquerque, New Mexico. Victims can't identify the masked attacker and worse still, it looks like he's expanding his hunting grounds.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: She Loves Me Not
programme.desc: When Special Forces Major David Shannon is fatally shot in his family home, investigators wonder if his job made him a target. But a deeper inspection of his personal life reveals sordid secrets... possibly leading to his murder.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Sick and Twisted
programme.desc: Dana MacKay is found viciously beaten to death while her husband is out of town. One suspect comes to mind: a woman who's been stalking Dana for the last month. But it will take a cellphone with X-rated text messages to unravel this mystery.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Dr. Deception

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Fear the Ether Man
programme.desc: A serial rapist known as the Ether Man lurks in the shadows of Albuquerque, New Mexico. Victims can't identify the masked attacker and worse still, it looks like he's expanding his hunting grounds.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Lost at Sea
programme.desc: ABC News Correspondent Linzie Janis speaks exclusively to Nathan Carman about his rescue from the ill-fated fishing trip that claimed his mother Linda's life.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Her Last Chance
programme.desc: After two trials, Kimberly Long was convicted of brutally murdering her boyfriend, Ozzy Conde, has spent seven years in prison, and, with the help of The California Innocence Project, she now has a new shot at justice.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Dangerous Games
programme.desc: A pretty social media sensation and an NBA superstar connect online. But as the relationship heats up, extortion and threats of violence turn their romance into a nightmare.

programme.title: A Fatal Confession: Keith Morrison Investigates
programme.desc: In 1993, 16-year-old Daniel Villegas confessed to killing two teenagers in El Paso, Texas. He was sentenced to life in prison. Keith investigates to see if Daniel was forced to confess to a shooting he knew nothing about.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Sex, Lies and Crimes
programme.desc: A scandalous affair between a tutor and student; Young father's shocking lie; An attorney blindsided by an angry client's fist; Man threatens to kill judge; Bailiff's shoe saves an escapee's life; Judge and defendant have shared past.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: If I Can't Have You
programme.desc: A grieving father goes on the attack; Jealous obsession ends in murderous rage; A victim faces her stalker; A prosecutor throws a temper tantrum in court; A hero judge chases prisoners who bolt.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Predators Among Us
programme.desc: Infamous sex abuse sports doctor attacked by angry parent; a gang member, a snitch and the F.B.I. collide; defiant defendant curses out judge; murderer taunts mother of two teenage sons; singing for a lenient sentence; prisoner meets his baby in court.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Vanishing Babysitter
programme.desc: 15-year-old Elizabeth Ennen was last seen when a friend dropped her off at home. Her distraught mother Virginia says she never walked through the door. Police are baffled until they uncover a piece of CCTV that turns the case in an unexpected direction.

programme.title: See No Evil: Random Sighting
programme.desc: Tosha Lampkin is in Shreveport, Louisiana visiting family. After a late-night trip for food, Tosha disappears. Her burnt out rental car is discovered... along with Tosha's remains. CCTV cameras provide detectives with their only lead on her killers.

programme.title: See No Evil: Michigan City Murder
programme.desc: On April 23, 2016, car salesman Hufracio Arteaga is found stabbed to death in his Michigan City office. Surveillance cameras in the area may have filmed the fatal encounter.

programme.title: See No Evil: Blue Blood
programme.desc: On April 3rd, 2017, Assistant Chief Deputy Clint Greenwood is shot dead at point blank range at the Harris County courthouse outside Houston, Texas. With no witnesses, detectives launch a man hunt. Can security cameras lead them to Clint's killer?

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Don't Look Back
programme.desc: Karen Simek is a talented food service worker. When her body is found with a gunshot wound outside her office in the early morning hours, it leaves her family in shock and sparks a year-long investigation, which ultimately leads detectives to her killer.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The Truth Will Set You Free
programme.desc: Explore the truth behind the stories of Pocahontas, Lewis and Clark and the women's suffrage movement.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vito Genovese
programme.desc: The story of Vito Genovese, who ruthlessly dealt with disloyalty in the Mafia and quickly rose to prominence - but unwittingly caused his own downfall.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joe Massino
programme.desc: Joe Massino, the 'Last Don', crushes anyone who goes against the mafia code of omerta. Loyalty to his family and obedience to their code of silence, is everything. But when the Feds take Massino down, Massino takes everyone down with him.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Arnold 'The Brain' Rothstein
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and set the model for running a crime business.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Donnie Brasco
programme.desc: Former FBI agent Joe Pistone, who infiltrated the Mafia for six years as Donnie Brasco, reveals how his undercover work led to more than 100 convictions - and resulted in the death of underworld figure Dominick 'Sonny Black' Napolitano.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents

programme.title: Epic Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880s Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Epic Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields versus the McCoys is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Sheriff Baker and the Everglades Blood Feud
programme.desc: The Everglades are home to bank robbers, rumrunners, and cold-blooded killers. Sheriff Bob Baker is determined to take down one of the most infamous and deadly gangs in Florida's history.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Franklin D. Roosevelt
programme.desc: Japanese bombers attack Pearl Harbor and sink a large part of the US Pacific Fleet. President Franklin D. Roosevelt decides it's time for the United States to strike back.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Charles de Gaulle
programme.desc: June 16, 1940. Paris has fallen to the Nazis and the German conquest of France is almost complete. Prime Minister Henri Petain plans to sign an armistice with Nazi Germany, but French General Charles de Gaulle secedes and rebels against the policy.

programme.title: Air Aces: Douglas Bader
programme.desc: In July 1940, Britain's most celebrated air ace, Douglas Bader, and his ragtag squadron of Canadian fighter pilots, went into battle against Hitler's mighty Luftwaffe.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for Future Generations
programme.desc: Mary wants the Cabin Masters to re-imagine the current footprint of the camp, and create additional bedroom/sleeping space while expanding the bathroom to accommodate their large family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Golden Years Family Camp
programme.desc: After buying her parents' old summer camp in Bridgton, a mother calls on the crew to help her completely renovate the home for her parents to retire in full-time. With a $40,000 budget and an open time line, the crew transform it into a retirement space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Keeping the Dreams Alive
programme.desc: Chase and the team will have their hands full as they navigate the treacherous hillside while they stabilize the camp and restore it so the family can continue to enjoy it for at least another 42 years.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Building Hope
programme.desc: Ingrid was in the process of converting a small cottage into a modern home when she suffered an aneurysm and two strokes. Her daughter took over, but needs Mike's help.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Lawn and Order
programme.desc: Dan and Sarah envied their neighbour's deck, and after receiving a too good to be true quote, hired the same person for the job. But the project was much bigger than anticipated and vastly underquoted. Mike arrives just in time to avoid catastrophe.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Investment Gate

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Broken Record

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Money for Nothing

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Rework in Wisconsin
programme.desc: A couple finds a fixer-upper in Wisconsin that overlooks Lake Michigan and they're doing all the renovation work themselves. He's a contractor with experience renovating properties, and she's ready to join him and get her hands dirty.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Modern Farmhouse Fix-up
programme.desc: In Texas, Dan and Emily find a waterfront home on Cedar Creek Lake that has tons of potential but needs a lot of work. They hope their budget is enough to give them the open floor plan and modern farmhouse look they desire.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Big Wow on Alabama's Lake Wedowee
programme.desc: After spending years renting on Lake Wedowee in Alabama, Chris and Jenny are ready to purchase a vacation home for their family. A local agent helps the couple land a charming lakefront property, but it's in need of major improvements.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Wolf Lake Escape
programme.desc: New parents look to escape their busy New York City lives with a move to Wolf Lake, a small, rustic lake community in upstate New York. The properties they consider require significant renovations and may break the bank.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweetlandia
programme.desc: We're traveling to Portland, Ore., to discover some of the city's most scrumptious and satisfying treats.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Bite of the Big Apple
programme.desc: We're in New York City, discovering the places that are serving up the most unique sweet treats from around the world.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Morning Munchies

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Next Level Sweets
programme.desc: We sample nine cutting-edge creations, including the coconut cremeaux at The Pig and the Lady in Honolulu: an edible fantasy landscape with creamy chocolate mountains.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: SoCal Sweets
programme.desc: We're coasting through Southern California to cool down with the hottest frozen treats. At Snow Monster in Long Beach, they offer sophisticated ice cream creations, like macaron ice cream sandwiches and drinks topped with clouds of cotton candy.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Twists on American Classics
programme.desc: The Doughnut Project in New York City offers savory-meets-sweet doughnuts, including a doughnut crossed with an everything bagel, and a chocolate cream doughnut flavored with bone marrow.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Wake Up Call
programme.desc: The chefs make wicked spicy hot chocolate and peanut butter and banana French toast.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: With My Hands
programme.desc: The chefs talk about dishes that are meant to be eaten with their fingers.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Buttered Up
programme.desc: Chefs and food experts are revealing the richest, creamiest buttery dishes out there. Alex Guarnaschelli brings on the butter with a one-of-a-kind shrimp-and-grits combo from Tillie's in Short Hills, New Jersey.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Let's Do Lunch
programme.desc: Ali Khan makes a beeline for an over-the-top pistachio chicken salad creation in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Hamburger Heaven
programme.desc: It's burger time, and your favourite food personalities are pointing you in the right direction.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Small Plates, Big Taste
programme.desc: Chef Beau MacMillan dives into scallops; Roger Mooking travels to Texas for succulent chicken.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Puerto Vallarta
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern heads to Mexico's Pacific coast and the resort town of Puerto Vallarta to explore the local cuisine. He finds local favorites reimagined to the delight of visitors, like grilled flour tortillas topped with marinated pork roast.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mississippi Delta
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic soul food of the Mississippi Delta. From fried catfish and hushpuppies to smothered oxtails and decadent mud pie, the Deep South's down-home dishes soothe the soul.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Kansas City
programme.desc: Andrew visits Kansas City, where he discovers a swirled Croatian dessert bread and a locally-made marshmallow chocolate candy.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Trinidad And Tobago
programme.desc: Andrew samples the island flavors and culinary mashups of Trinidad and Tobago. These islands have a passion for food and life, featuring dishes like curried crab with dumplings, crispy fried shark sandwiches and soft and silky flatbreads.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Los Angeles, California, is the capital of stardom, and that includes its cuisine. In a city known for such edible icons as Korean tacos and the L.A. street dog, Andrew Zimmern explores just what makes this destination so delicious.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Francisco
programme.desc: Look no further than San Francisco, California for the best eating on the West Coast. Built on classics like Dungeness Crab Louie and sourdough bread, Andrew Zimmern discovers just what makes the City by the Bay so delectable.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Fe, New Mexico
programme.desc: Casey Webb's search for the biggest and best in Santa Fe, New Mexico, starts with a sopapilla stuffed with carne asada. Then he takes on some game-changing ice cream flavored with the local delicacy, green chiles.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manchester, New Hampshire
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels bring him to Manchester, New Hampshire, for an epic portion of barbecue that's served on a shovel at KC's Rib Shack. At local favourite Mr. Mac's Mac and Cheese, he only has eyes for their magnum opus.

programme.title: The Closer: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Deputy Chief Johnson's investigation into a famous Hollywood divorce attorney found floating in his swimming pool is under heavy scrutiny. Meanwhile, Fritz and Brenda are trying to consolidate their bills, but Brenda discovers a secret.

programme.title: The Closer: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Under intense pressure, Brenda has forty-eight hours to break a new witness' alibi and get her case back on track. Meanwhile, Brenda's relationship with Fritz is in danger as secrets loom.

programme.desc: A woman's disappearance is tracked by a casino's security cameras. Investigators collect enough evidence left behind from the victim to inform them of who was responsible and how she disappeared.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seedy Intentions

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry

programme.desc: Mountaineer Jake Norton and his team search the upper reaches of Everest for undiscovered clues that prove who was the first climber to get to the top. The mystery has perplexed historians for a century, and a big find would change history forever.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Living on the Edge
programme.desc: The Raney family kicks off the most ambitious rescue ever, on their own 40 acres. As multiple generations gather to chip in, Marty attempts a dangerous river crossing to get thousands of pounds of gear to the homestead.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Holy Grail Hot Rod

programme.title: The First 48: The Detective Speaks: Lester Street
programme.desc: Toney and his team respond to Memphis's worst mass murder in more than 15 years.

programme.title: The First 48: The Detective Speaks: Murder in Treme
programme.desc: In New Orleans, when a woman is slashed to death, the investigation into her murder leads Dets. Chuck Ward and Rob Barrere to a house of horrors, and they discover the killer may be someone they least expected.

programme.title: The First 48: The Detective Speaks: Deadly Morning
programme.desc: In Cleveland, a young mother walking alone to work is viscously murdered and dumped in an abandoned house.

programme.title: The First 48 Presents: Homicide Squad Atlanta: Fallen Angel
programme.desc: After a teenager is found murdered in a city park, rookie detective Andre Lowe must find the truth behind the crime. The Homicide Unit and the public, the team scour over possible leads. The victim's car is found miles away, complicating things.

programme.title: The First 48 Presents: Homicide Squad Atlanta: The Dark Staircase
programme.desc: Detective Jamael Logan investigates the brutal murder of a young woman found beaten and shot to death in an Atlanta shopping center.

programme.title: The First 48 Presents: Homicide Squad Atlanta: The Jealous Kind
programme.desc: After an intense interrogation, Detective Logan finally gets his suspect to confess to brutally murdering Misha Moore over eight dollars. A 16-year-old out on a double date gets caught in a shootout with the other woman's jealous boyfriend.

programme.title: The First 48 Presents: Homicide Squad Atlanta: Secrets & Lies
programme.desc: New leads emerge in the Fallen Angel case, and in the heart of Atlanta's wealthiest neighborhood, a man is brutally beaten and shot to death.

programme.title: The First 48 Presents: Homicide Squad Atlanta: Hot Sun, Cold Blood
programme.desc: Detective Zimbrick gets a DNA match on a 16-year old cold case. He and Quinn head to San Francisco where the suspect is incarcerated and get a series of extraordinary lucky breaks along the way.

programme.title: The First 48 Presents: Homicide Squad Atlanta: The Cooler
programme.desc: A DNA hit in the Bridget Shiel murder investigation identifies a compelling new suspect who was recently imprisoned for a double homicide--Christopher Spencer.

programme.title: The First 48: Left to Burn/ Trigger Happy
programme.desc: Fire fighters in Detroit respond to a house fire and find a 63-year-old woman stabbed and bound.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 3
programme.desc: Join the guys as they do what they do best: talk with their mouths full. The boys will surely be eating a well-balanced meal and dishing out what they've been up to at home.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 4
programme.desc: You're cordially invited to a one-of-a-kind dinner party at Joe, Q, Murr, and Sal's homes from the comfort of your own.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 5
programme.desc: The guys dine and discuss their week. Find out who can make the best meal and how long Q's beard has become.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 6
programme.desc: The guys put their culinary skills to the test by serving dishes the viewers requested. Plus, find out if Joe grew a mustache.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: It's Electric
programme.desc: The guys pitch whimsical TV show idea to focus groups and then go to the park with their 'daughters' who share unpopular opinions. The loser heads to the spa for an electrifying punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 1
programme.desc: Be a guest at a dinner party with the stars of the show. Join Sal, Joe, Q and Murr aka 'The Tenderloins,' as they dish about their week, their friendship and whatever else is thrown on their dinner table.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 2
programme.desc: Take a seat at the table as the guys dish out what they've been up to this week at home. Get a glimpse of how the guys really hang out and, after some grub, they'll battle it out over who will be hosting next week's meal.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Joke and Dagger
programme.desc: The guys crash a gallery opening where their antics aren't appreciated, they pass bizarre judgment on unsuspecting grocery shoppers, and the loser takes a spin on a terrifying wheel where one wrong move could have deadly consequences.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Car Sick
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q freak out a focus group by reading ridiculous answers, and then participate in a thrilling toilet paper shootout in their favourite market. Plus, the loser’s fancy dinner party turns into the messiest ride of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tied and Feathered
programme.desc: The guys teach a crash course in sorry behaviour, ask strangers to settle bizarre debates and spread surprisingly good news at the mall. Plus, tonight’s loser has his hands tied when a day at the park turns into a frightful mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Smushed
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr give a security presentation that’s anything but safe, then hold hands with strangers in the park.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Cars

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Drone Care

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Sets Itself, Lights Itself
programme.desc: Michael loses a credit card in a series of absorbing containers, and then in an art store, he shakes off sloppy handwriting to reveal fancy calligraphy. Later, a catering assistant gets spooked when chinaware sets itself.

programme.desc: A tipsy Mayor earning a DUI, some severe Australian road rage, and a snowmobile avalanche you won't believe.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Raccoon Rescue
programme.desc: With the help of local police, Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett remove campers found illegally occupying state property. An 8-year-old boy is found riding solo on an ATV, and Officer Crouse helps two raccoon cubs found on the road.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Twists and Turns
programme.desc: Officer McDermott finds an abandoned truck, sparking a winding investigation. Officer Holmes and Sgt. Lucas rescue paddlers of a capsized canoe. Later, Holmes responds to a moose accident, while OFC. Frye consoles a bereft woman.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: During a busy "Old Home Day", Officer Delmer patrols the ATV trails. Officer McFazden rescues a trapped barred owl and takes it to be rehabilitated. On Mount Liberty, Officer Towne and trainee LaTourneau save an injured hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Best of Bronson
programme.desc: Officer Bronson revisits some of his most memorable moments while on the job. Bronson recalls facing his fear of snakes, exposing an illegal deer hunter, and encountering a man with an unusual definition of fishing.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Mountaintop Mystery
programme.desc: On Mt. Monadnock, a severed finger is found, sending a team and K-9 Wyatt to search for other possible body parts. A family of repeat offenders are found riding their ATVs without proper protective gear, and a man admits to an illegal bear kill.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Running Out of Time
programme.desc: The wardens, the National Guard, and dozens of volunteers team up in a massive, days-long search for a hiker missing in the vast wilderness of the White Mountains. And, the wardens take on some familiar faces in a charity softball game.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Mountaintop Mystery

programme.title: North Woods Law: Best of Bronson

programme.title: North Woods Law: Wicked Summer
programme.desc: Sergeant Craven corners a runaway ATV and later must determine which of two double-crossing friends is telling the truth.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Boat Load of Trouble
programme.desc: Maine Game Wardens head-out on jet skis and speed boats to patrol the rivers and lakes.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters: Pulled Under
programme.desc: Cyril ventures deeper and deeper into caiman and piranha-filled swamps to find out what unidentified creature is pulling fisherman into the water and even causing them to disappear.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters: Piranha Attack
programme.desc: To determine if a predator fish with razor-sharp teeth really could be responsible for mysterious disappearances and brutal attacks, Cyril must survive deep in the Amazon jungle chasing the mythical black piranha.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters: High Voltage Killers
programme.desc: An electric eel can emit a 700-volt shock to kill its prey. Although these eels are part of countless myths, much about them is still unknown. In order to understand this creature, Cyril has been given the dangerous task of catching the beast.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters: Deadly Jaws
programme.desc: Every year, hundreds of wildlife attacks and accidents occur in Florida. In this episode, Cyril attempts to understand why marine predators attack humans, and figure out the factors that can trigger this unexpected and devastating aggression.

programme.title: Whale Wars: Setting the Trap
programme.desc: The stakes are higher than ever as the Japanese whaling fleet returns to Antarctica to resume its hunt.

programme.title: Whale Wars: Games of Chance
programme.desc: The crew of the Steve Irwin fear there's a Japanese whaler's factory ship nearby. Meanwhile, the Bridgitte Bardot is struck by a rogue wave and her crew prepare to abandon ship.

programme.title: Whale Wars: Dead in the Water
programme.desc: The terrified crew of the damaged Brigitte Bardot issues a distress call to the rest of the Sea Shepherd fleet, but help is more than 20 hours away. Fighting swells and brutal cold, the crew hopes to hold the outrigger in place with rope and straps.

programme.title: Whale Wars: Into the Belly of the Beast
programme.desc: With the Japanese fleet's security vessel looming on the horizon, the captain of the badly damaged Brigitte Bardot orders his crew to evacuate the boat.

programme.title: Whale Wars: Crossing the Line
programme.desc: The exhausted crew of the Brigitte Bardot scramble to evacuate the ailing vessel. And Captain Paul Watson goes on the offensive, sending a team to board the heavily armed security vessel: the Shonan Maru.

programme.title: Whale Wars: Never Say Die
programme.desc: The crew of the Steve Irwin are plunged into their most violent battle yet.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume One
programme.desc: Explore the mysteries and legends surrounding seven spine tingling sites.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume Two
programme.desc: Dine with ghosts then party with the paranormal at a haunted nightclub. Head underground in Portland where unsuspecting folks were held captive and then hit up a haunted mansion and tattoo parlor.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume Three
programme.desc: In this hour of Most Terrifying Places in America, we keep crisscrossing the country to tour even more paranormal hotspots. We visit a castle outside of Seattle that is haunted by a suicidal monk, and an early American Inn near Boston.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume Four
programme.desc: In this instalment of the Most Terrifying Place in America, we visit the deepest, darkest, haunted spots our country has to offer. We explore a bar in Chicago that contains forces so dark it causes visitors to turn horribly violent.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume Five
programme.desc: In this hour of the Most Terrifying Place in America, we're touring more of the spookiest spots in the country! We visit a defunct amusement park that delivers a unique 'thrill', and a residence so haunted the owner rarely sleeps there!

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume Six
programme.desc: In this hour, continue the search for places that'll make you scream. Stop by an old prison where ghosts of the country's worst violent offenders roam, and a Chicago home that inspired the legend of the Devil Baby.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume Seven
programme.desc: Visit an Illinois cemetery and a theater in Cincinnati that was built over a mass grave.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Unnatural World
programme.desc: From a Nebraska road where a farmer hung his entire family to an Upstate New York farmhouse where a demon has long overstayed its welcome, we explore locations linked to unnerving and terrifying tales.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Haunted Road Trips
programme.desc: From a Mississippi bridge where a murderer was hanged for his crimes to Savannah's oldest operating hotel built prior to the Civil War, these terrifying roads and haunted roadside spots will make any driver want to lock the doors and roll up the windows.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pom Pom Pawn
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars prepare to be boarded when a customer brings in a 1600's naval blunderbuss. Rick is presented with the ultimate Coca Cola collectible: a 1978 GMC Coke sponsored motor home.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The King's Bling
programme.desc: The team is presented with a necklace, made of an entire pound of gold, that was once owned by the King of Rock and Roll himself, Elvis Presley.

programme.title: Columbus: The Lost Voyage
programme.desc: Early in the 16th century, Christopher Columbus found himself awaiting execution in a Caribbean prison. He escaped and took four ships on one last journey, but ended up shipwrecked.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Ring Around a Rockne
programme.desc: A signet ring that belonged to mob boss Lucky Luciano comes out of hiding. Rick is in the red zone when a letter signed by legendary football coach Knute Rockne steps up to the line of scrimmage.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are up in arms when a late 1700's flintlock four-barrel handgun takes aim at the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Thirtysomethng
programme.desc: Light some candles with the Pawn Stars as the guys prepare a surprise for Chumlee's 30th birthday.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Goldfish and Silver
programme.desc: The guys check out a Honda Pilot ATV. Then, Rick and Chumlee give a seller shelter when he brings in a signed photo of the Rolling Stones.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Daddy's Girl
programme.desc: Artwork from graffiti sensation Keith Haring comes into the shop. Chumlee takes a look at a civil war utility tool. Later, Rick takes his daughter car shopping and has to deal with used car salesman and shop regular Davey.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: In the Doghouse
programme.desc: Storm the beaches with the Pawn Stars when hand drawn maps from the Normandy invasion hit the shop. Then, Rick reigns in a coin featuring the likeness of Roman Emperor Caligula.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rick, Rock, and Roll
programme.desc: Two first editions of 'A Christmas Carol' appear in the shop and Corey must decide if he'll cough up the cash. Then, Rick gets rocked when a meteorite drops in. Later, Chumlee plans a night of bowling with the guys.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Press One for Chum
programme.desc: An autograph of baseball legend Honus Wagner lands in the shop. Then, Rick crushes on a rare, first edition of Nabokov's controversial novel, 'Lolita.' Later, Chumlee helps set up the shop's new phone system.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Dollars and Dunks
programme.desc: Rick checks out one of Kobe Bryant's warm-up jerseys that's been signed by the man himself. An antique weapon sale finds Rick debating the item's price. Corey makes an impulsive buy of a favourite novel.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Longshot Pawn
programme.desc: A Nepalese Bira gun from the late 1800s, a 1970s Bob Peak TWA mural, a three-trumpet brass horn.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn or Bust
programme.desc: A bust of Marlon Brando has Rick making its owner an offer he can't refuse. It's game on with the Pawn Stars when a Donkey Kong penny bank from the early 1980s barrels into the store. Rick spots a cyclops print made by a member of the band Devo.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Samurais and Centerfolds
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars learn the way of the samurai when Rick and Chumlee come to grips with a valuable Japanese katana from the 1800s.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Devil Went Down to Vegas
programme.desc: A paratrooper folding bike from World War II crosses the Pawn Stars' path. Corey is face to face with an antique German clock. A fiddle signed by singer Charlie Daniels has Rick itching to make a deal. An old miner's self-rescuer finds Rick.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Can't Pawn Me Love
programme.desc: The Venetian Hotel hosts some pricey illustrations from the children's book, 'Where the Wild Things Are,' which greatly intrigue Rick. At the shop, an ultra-rare Beatles vinyl collection impresses Chum. Chum also finds an antique hot dog bun warmer.

programme.title: NCIS: Something Blue

programme.title: NCIS: Rendezvous

programme.title: NCIS: Sea Dog

programme.title: Family Guy: Big Trouble in Little Quahog

programme.desc: Learn what goes into making pewter flasks, potato salad, hydrogen fuel cells and engineered wood siding.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Revenge of the Killer Queen
programme.desc: Advanced archaeology and cutting edge science join forces to unmask the truth behind Cleopatra's enduring legacy, not as ancient Egypt's most celebrated seductress, but as a political mastermind and ruthless, cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Curse of the Ice Princess
programme.desc: After a 2,500-year-old mummy is discovered in Siberia, locals report strange, cataclysmic events that point to an ancient curse; using cutting-edge archaeology, experts reveal who this person was and if they've unleashed something sinister.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Alien Ice Towers
programme.desc: When strange towers of ice are found growing from in a barren, water-starved desert, experts speculate why these structures have uncanny similarities to extraterrestrial formations recently discovered on Pluto's alien landscape.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Screaming Mummy
programme.desc: The Screaming Mummy is one of Egypt's greatest mysteries: a mummy with a terrifying expression frozen in agony. New discoveries reveal the connection between this horrific discovery and a pharaoh's murder, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Curse of the Ice Princess
programme.desc: After a 2,500-year-old mummy is discovered in Siberia, locals report strange, cataclysmic events that point to an ancient curse; using cutting-edge archaeology, experts reveal who this person was and if they've unleashed something sinister.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Alien Ice Towers
programme.desc: When strange towers of ice are found growing from in a barren, water-starved desert, experts speculate why these structures have uncanny similarities to extraterrestrial formations recently discovered on Pluto's alien landscape.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Tut's Curse: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal if King Tut's tomb is indeed cursed, as it is said to have killed nine people. The latest science might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to investigate more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Hell Island
programme.desc: Explore a ghost town that was once a dangerous industrial hellscape, a giant warship at the bottom of the ocean, and a top secret relic that could have changed the Cold War.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Soviet Doomsday Device
programme.desc: Explore what happened to a classified Soviet machine built to prevent all-out nuclear war, a top secret Nazi facility, and a strange tower that left an enduring legacy.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Underwater Ghost Prison
programme.desc: An entrance to the underworld in the American wild, a haunting Soviet underwater prison, and a strange complex of towers in a forest of ice are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Desert Ghost Fort
programme.desc: A secret Russian military base in the Gobi Desert, a strange complex in an American wasteland, and a relic high atop a mountain are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting on Plague Island
programme.desc: A strange complex of buildings on a remote tropical island was once home to a large seaside community, but today, locals avoid the area and claim that it's haunted. New discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: America's Doomsday Town
programme.desc: A strange deserted city in America's heartland, an eerie gigantic wall deep in snow-capped mountains, and a mysterious top-secret Soviet facility were built and then abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: House of Horror
programme.desc: An eerie set of buildings in Paris is evidence of an unspeakable evil. New discoveries reveal the horrific things that happened here, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secret of Supervillain Island
programme.desc: On a strange island off the coast of Croatia, the mysterious ruins of a long-abandoned hideout look like they once belonged to a James Bond supervillain, and new discoveries reveal why it was built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hell on Blood Island
programme.desc: An island of dense jungle is home to an abandoned complex with a dark past of bloodshed and rebellion, and new discoveries at this deserted place reveal why it was built and the gruesome circumstances of its downfall.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The World's Strangest Disaster Zones
programme.desc: A deserted city half buried, whole villages swallowed by the earth, temples turned to rubble, and an arctic town facing a deadly threat. Within these structures are the echoes of history; each haunted shell now ready to tell its own story.

programme.title: Unearthed: Draining the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Cutting-edge tech is helping experts investigate the mysteries of the Bermuda Triangle like never before, and as new discoveries reveal alien phenomena at the bottom of the ocean floor, they might finally uncover the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Scene of the Crime
programme.desc: When Brad McGarry is discovered murdered in his Ohio basement, residents in this sleepy coalmining town are left in shock. Detectives suspect robbery but then a friend comes forward and points them in the direction of someone whom they least expected.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Twisted Upside Down
programme.desc: The streets of Kalamazoo, Michigan are awash with rumors about 69-year-old, William Gray.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Things Weigh on You
programme.desc: Jeffrey Franklin, a deaf sixteen-year-old, is dead. Now, body-cam video and original audio capture detectives' hunt for what happened. As the investigation unravels, GPS data and shocking admissions give Jeffrey the justice he desperately deserves.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Wished My Son Were Dead
programme.desc: It has been more than 25 years, yet Joyce Alexander is still terrified of her son, William Patrick Alexander. She fears he holds her responsible for his horrifying crime, and is convinced he is plotting his revenge from prison.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Mother's Lies
programme.desc: Years after her interview, Cindy Taylor revisits memories of her mother. When Cindy was a teen, the sudden death of her father shattered her world. Years later, she learned her father's death was just one of the deadly secrets her mother had been hiding.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: I Am The Devil
programme.desc: A missing Colorado woman's roommate claims she'll do anything to help find her, but investigators fear they may have a rare female psychopath on their hands. Later, a killer's angry outbursts could be real, or just an act put on by a skilled manipulator.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: In the Lion's Cage
programme.desc: Linda Wittmier and Terry Jo Howard both fell in love with James Michael Randall. And both suffered when they discovered the monster that lurked inside him. But they never realized how lucky they were to survive his twisted sexual desire to kill.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Mother's Lies
programme.desc: Years after her interview, Cindy Taylor revisits memories of her mother. When Cindy was a teen, the sudden death of her father shattered her world. Years later, she learned her father's death was just one of the deadly secrets her mother had been hiding.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: I Am The Devil
programme.desc: A missing Colorado woman's roommate claims she'll do anything to help find her, but investigators fear they may have a rare female psychopath on their hands. Later, a killer's angry outbursts could be real, or just an act put on by a skilled manipulator.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Cop and the Killer
