programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Home Sweet Nightmare
programme.desc: Sheila Janutolo dreaded being alone with her husband Jim Cruz. Over the years, she had learned to fear him and his violent temper. But when she got a call that he'd been arrested for a ghastly crime, she was certain police had the wrong man.

programme.title: American Monster: Into the Swamp
programme.desc: At a family-run construction company, brothers and cousins work hard together - and play even harder. But when one of them vanishes, no one has answers. The mystery of his disappearance - and the salacious betrayal behind it - isn't solved for 20 years.

programme.title: American Monster: Momma's Girl
programme.desc: Great-Grandfather Arthur Burney knows he's lucky to have such a large loving family. But when a dead body is discovered everyone becomes a suspect - and it'll take an unexpected tip-off to reveal the mastermind behind the murder.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Blood Money
programme.desc: John joins police on a strange and twisting missing persons case that turns fatal, sending investigators on the trail of Alejandro Castillo; Cal takes on the case of Leticia Smith, a woman on the run from a terrible crime with nothing to lose.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Deadly Poser
programme.desc: Ex-Marine Raymond 'R.J.' McLeod seems like a knight in shining armor to one single mom, but as John Walsh reveals, she was far from safe. Then, Callahan Walsh discovers how rapper Maurice Nesbitt's constant abuse of his girlfriend eventually turns deadly.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: A Personal Mission
programme.desc: When a double shooting leaves one woman dead and another clinging to life, John joins police on the trail of fugitive Lenell Kirby. Callahan takes on the mysterious murder of a dear Walsh family friend, Lindsay Harris.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Campus Tragedy
programme.desc: John Walsh spotlights freshman who allegedly introduces a knife to a fistfight that claims a star college student's life. Later, Callahan Walsh looks for Thayne Smika, who, police believe, shoots his roommate in cold blood over back rent.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Monkey in the Middle
programme.desc: A man finds himself living between hostile neighbors on both sides, including a former marine with severe PTSD. Their campaign of intimidation ramps up to the point of no return, ending with a deadly confrontation on the street outside their homes.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Good Fences Make Dead Neighbors
programme.desc: Instead of a brand new start, a man's move to Canyon Country, California, finds him locked in a bizarre and increasingly acrimonious eight year feud with his neighbor – that is finally resolved with blasts from a shotgun.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Homeowner Hell
programme.desc: A couple settles in Josephine County, Oregon, where they learn their new neighbor has a deadly past. Now, as relations sour and tempers flare, blood will be spilled on this land.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Hysteria Lane
programme.desc: A couple who tragically lost their son are thrilled when a family with two boys moves in across the street. But the relationship soon sours, engulfing all of them in conflict, accusation, and finally a deadly shooting.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: Red Mustang
programme.desc: When 22-year-old LeAnne Martinez fails to pick up her daughter from her mother's house, her family worries. Her red Mustang is missing, and what they find inside her home will leave them forever scarred.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: On Her Own
programme.desc: Native Swede, Marioara Shand, is setting out on her own in Taos, New Mexico, after a recent breakup. One day in July of 2002, police discover her body in a brutal, bloody scene inside her new home.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: He Made Me Do It
programme.desc: Lila Warwick is a loving and hands-on grandmother of eight whose door is always open for holidays, birthdays or for anyone in need of a helping hand.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Verge of Destruction
programme.desc: We've all heard about the fallout shelters used for refuge during World War II, the deadly firebombing of Tokyo, and the D-Day invasion on the beaches of Normandy but there are more secrets.

programme.title: Nazis vs. Aliens
programme.desc: The incredible story of how Nazi scientists and UFOs combined to create technology that changed the world.

programme.title: Hollywood vs. Commies
programme.desc: The amazing story of how Hollywood took on Communism and played a key role in winning the Cold War.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bat Masterson: Defender of Dodge
programme.desc: This well-dressed gunfighter was a gambler, a hunter, an Indian fighter, and a scout; but above all else, Bat Masterson was a lawman. As Sheriff of Ford County, Kansas, Bat Masterson kept the peace on the volatile Frontier.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Jesse James: The South's Last Rebel
programme.desc: The life and exploits of outlaw Jesse James are recounted.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Hitler's Obsession
programme.desc: Hitler's desire to acquire the largest art collection in the world led to the theft of numerous rare art treasures throughout Europe. The team delves into how these mass thefts were orchestrated. Also, an astounding discovery is made.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Nazi Gold
programme.desc: Stolen gold was the fuel of the Nazi War industry. The team looks into the quantity looted and where it's believed to have ended up. The chilling story of a Canadian Commando and gold taken at Auschwitz is revealed.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Rural Retreat Historical Society
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the team travel to the Rural Retreat Historical Society in Rural Retreat, Virginia. Mike sets up rigging from the rooftop for an outdoor clock while Robert salvages a vault door and bank teller station.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Free Will House
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawg team travels to Free Will House in Huntington, West Virginia, where they salvage a bathtub, sitz bath and kitchen cabinets.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: St. Mary's Rectory
programme.desc: The team finds cast-iron mantles, a built-in cabinet, and a stained glass front doorway.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Grace Family Church
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage crew travels to Vinton, Virginia, in order to salvage a massive piece of stained glass from the Grace Family Church. They run into challenges when equipment is delayed.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Trinity Lutheran Church
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs go to Greencastle, PA, to salvage an old church that is being restored for a physical therapy office. The team struggles to figure out the best way to remove the windows, salvage the large bell and execute an idea for a console.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: St. Andrews Church Spires
programme.desc: The Dawgs help save copper elements from the St. Andrews Catholic Church spires in Roanoke, VA. The guys also bring in an expert to learn more about a large lithograph from a previous salvage.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Blown-out Beach House
programme.desc: A family with many fond memories of summer vacations in their Lewes, Delaware, beach house finds that their cottage's awkward layout isn't working. The space is maximized by vaulting the ceiling as well as adding an open-concept ground floor.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Bethany Beach Bunks
programme.desc: A family with a new baby is bursting out of their cramped bungalow in Bethany Beach, Delaware. Marnie creates more space for the family by opening up the kitchen, relocating a laundry room and building magical bunk beds to accommodate the children.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Sun Room to Fun Room
programme.desc: After years of pleading from their daughters, this couple has agreed to renovate their '90s themed house. Now it's up to Marnie to bring their house into the 21st century and make it comfortable enough for three generations.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Seaside Spectacular
programme.desc: A family living in their dream location of Bethany Beach, DE, calls on Marnie to save their cramped 1980s beach house. Marnie's mission is to drag it into the present with a nautical makeover and make it look as beautiful as the beaches around it.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Beach Dreams
programme.desc: Marnie's friend Leslie has achieved her dream of buying a beautiful house on the beach, but it needs a lot of work. Now she needs Marnie's help to turn it into the beach home and entertaining hub she's always dreamed about.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: A House Built on Sand
programme.desc: A couple's beach cottage in Dewey, Delaware, is just a few steps to the beach, but the house has no curb appeal and feels dated. They enlist Marnie to give it a face lift, but during demolition, Marnie finds that the foundation is sinking into the sand.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: On the Hunt for a St. Pete Beach Retreat in Florida
programme.desc: After vacationing in St. Pete Beach, Florida, for many years, a couple purchases an older condo in a prime location that needs a total gut job. Managing a long-distance project from their home in New York poses a challenge, as does the budget.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Three's Company on the Gulf Coast
programme.desc: A family searches for a beach retreat in Gulf Shores, AL. While they have different opinions on what type of house they should get, they all agree they want to live near the beach.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Westport Wonder
programme.desc: An outdoor enthusiast couple loves spending time at the beach in Westport, WA, and decide to buy a vacation home. The house they choose needs a major overhaul, but their limited budget may prevent their planned renovation.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Gulf Shores Gut Job
programme.desc: A couple gears up to make the coastal paradise of Gulf Shores, AL, their forever home. The couple hunts for a bargain and lands the perfect place in need of big-time renovations.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Boise, ID
programme.desc: Casey Webb ventures to beautiful Boise, Idaho, for a sushi and soup challenge so diabolically spicy, it goes by the name of Demon's Delight.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Grand Rapids, MI
programme.desc: Casey travels to Grand Rapids, Michigan, where he takes on a five-pound tray loaded with chili dogs, French fries, beer-battered onion rings and a 20-ounce soda.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Sensational Seafood
programme.desc: Armed with a serious love of food and years of experience in the restaurant business, Casey Webb travels the country in search of America's most delicious dishes and ultimate eating challenges.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Decadent Desserts
programme.desc: Casey's sojourn of sustenance has had no shortage of sweets, and now it's time to celebrate the best of the best. We're counting down the most decadent desserts in Man vs. Food history and inducting them into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Dangerously Good Eats

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beastly Burgers

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hawaii Fried Dough

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Toastbusters

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Deep-Fried Inferno
programme.desc: Where there's smoke, there's fire, and Noah Cappe is ready to have his taste buds fired up at the Spencerport Volunteer Firemen's Association Carnival in New York. From the Flaming Weck to the Five Alarm Fries, there's plenty of sizzle.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grillers in the Mist

programme.title: Carnival Eats: My Fair Latte

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Providence, Rhode Island
programme.desc: Adam visits Providence, Rhode Island for a unique grilled pizza and for the infamous Triple Murder Burger. Adam's journey concludes with him coaching a rugby player through 15 fully loaded hot wieners in 45 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: St. Louis, MO

programme.title: Man v. Food: Los Angeles, California

programme.desc: When a cheetah is accidentally set loose, Pip and Freddy must play a game of tag to catch it; Pip and Freddy find themselves leading a group of storks on a class trip.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Boo-Hoo to You!/ It's Glow Time
programme.desc: For Halloween, Dad surprises Doc with Sebastian, a motion sensor ghost.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Return to the Pumpkin Patch/ Haunted Howl-oween
programme.desc: After Bingo loses his collar at a pumpkin patch, he, Rolly and Hissy return to find it. When a neighborhood kid can't trick-or-treat because she's lost her costume, Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to track it down.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Monster Musical
programme.desc: Mickey Mouse and his friends teach important skills through their adventures.

programme.title: Bluey: Backpackers / The Adventure / Copycat
programme.desc: Mum and Dad go on an adventure with the kids; Bluey and Chloe have an imaginary adventure together; Bluey decides to copy Dad.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Henry and the Bad Girl
programme.desc: A gang of artists is spray-painting graffiti all over Swellview. While confronting them, Kid Danger is tempted by a cute girl in the gang, forcing him to choose between her and Captain Man.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Mo' Danger, Mo' Problems
programme.desc: As Henry tries to adjust to his new role as Kid Danger, he struggles to balance his schedule between crime fighting, school, family and friends.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Tears of the Jolly Beetle
programme.desc: When Captain Man loses his powers of invulnerability, he becomes too afraid to fight crime. It is up to Kid Danger to keep Swellview safe and figure out how to restore Captain Man's powers.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Lights, Camera, Adam/ A Case of Diary-Uh
programme.desc: Timmy lands the role of Cleft, the Boy Chin Wonder; Timmy uses Vickie's diary for revenge.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Just Desserts/ You Doo
programme.desc: After wishing that all the food in the world were desserts, Timmy helps himself to all the sweets. There is a magic doll that only fairies can make which can give you the power to make other people do whatever you tell them.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Anti-Poof
programme.desc: For every fairy, there's an anti-fairy - thus anti-Poof is born -FOOP!

programme.title: Nickelodeon's Unfiltered: This Planet Is Cuckoo!

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire

programme.title: Mom: Charlotte Bronte and a Backhoe

programme.title: Daily Mail TV

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: A Grizzly Encounter
